{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230258501E244CDB5E410B62F186"}"},"total":12573},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6992852994991833860","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说实话，身为学生党，我还是蛮喜欢这本书的。它有都市文的轻松，也有系统文的特点，还不缺少年独属的热血。关于这种学霸控分的题材也挺新颖，解题的细节也很到位，反正，对于我这个学生党而言，它比那种开局建长城的文章更能让我热血沸腾"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1628150468,"group_id":"6934722402504936455","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢风的透彻，像能望穿的快乐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/8Ljt+5UeHKPFEzDxqttxI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5100e8de833d49969a521c811f9a487c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795854&x-signature=%2BhiP8hTODWdm7xuYzFiZSFPLNMU%3D","user_id":"101799129713","user_name":"名字都被注册光了吧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101799129713","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6934722402504936455","book_info":{"abstract":"【学霸+系统+控分+黑科技，轻松无虐】
一场数学突击考，身为学霸的班长只得了50分，校花得了30分，课代表和学习委员更低，但作为上课瞌睡王，食堂干饭王的江南，却狂砍90分，名列第一？？？
数学老师：“小子，这下藏不住了吧？”
美女班主任：“怎么，你还不摊牌么？”
众多童鞋：“南神，你莫非真是隐藏的学霸？？？”
江南虚心摆摆手：“大家别猜了，我不是学霸，我只是传说中的控分狂魔而已！！！”
……
本书又名《别逼我，我只想低调当学渣啊！》，《学霸学神在他面前居然只是菜？》，《开考十分钟，我答完睡觉了，你们继续……》以及《从那天起，他惊艳了全世界！！！》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/990b8a0484c2c7152dcbdbf3e9137bea","author":"苍穹隐","author_id":"","book_id":"6934722402504936455","book_name":"超级学霸：从低调控分开始！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6934844437935686152","read_count":"45602","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2071862"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"962","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,学霸,多女主,校花,无脑爽,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/f0836ec937851eab438abdd0235a4731~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779389930&x-signature=xuUhhSIb
